# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys
input = sys.stdin.read

def main():
    data = input().split()
    N = int(data[0])
    S = data[1]

    # Stack to track indices of '('
    stack = []
    # List to mark characters to be removed
    to_remove = [False] * N

    for i in range(N):
        if S[i] == '(':
            stack.append(i)
        elif S[i] == ')':
            if stack:
                start = stack.pop()
                # Mark all characters from start to i as to be removed
                for j in range(start, i + 1):
                    to_remove[j] = True

    # Build the result string by skipping characters marked for removal
    result = ''.join([S[i] for i in range(N) if not to_remove[i]])
    print(result)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
